title: Care Gaps
description: Care Gaps surfaces patients who have not received recommended preventive or chronic disease management interventions. By identifying and acting on these gaps, care teams can improve quality measures, support value-based care programs, and prioritize outreach for at-risk populations.
tips: Filter care gaps by measure type and date range to focus outreach efforts on the highest-priority quality measures.
Combine care gap results with patient timeline data to understand the clinical context behind each identified gap.
Export care gap lists to your care management team for direct patient outreach workflows.
Re-run care gap analyses after an intervention period to measure the impact of outreach programs.
Align care gap measure definitions with standard quality frameworks such as HEDIS to ensure regulatory consistency.
